title: Craft Everything You See!
description: New crafting recipes: unlock impossible-to-get items and make common resources easier to obtain
body:
Adds over 144 new crafting recipes for obtainable and unobtainable items and blocks. Perfect for those who love crafting and exploring new possibilities in their Minecraft world! You can think of it as a new gameplay style where you craft only what you need, making it an essential addition to your experience. After all, Minecraft is all about crafting—it's in the name!

Check out the images of all the recipes below!
